message:
test(cli): refine JSON mode lifecycle assertions with role-aware event ordering

Rewrite assert_json_mode_lifecycle_shape() to validate the full event
lifecycle with role-specific message tracking:

- Distinguish user message_start/end from assistant message_start/end
  by checking the message.role field, ensuring the complete sequence:
  agent_start → user_message_start → user_message_end → turn_start →
  assistant_message_start → message_update → assistant_message_end →
  turn_end → agent_end

- Replace the generic index-chaining loop with explicit named index
  variables for each lifecycle phase, producing clearer assertion
  messages that identify exactly which ordering constraint failed

- Use a closure-based index_of() helper that accepts a predicate over
  the full event JSON value, enabling rich matching beyond just the
  type field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
